title: stipa montana
intro: Stipa montana, also known as mountain fleece, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Stipa montana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
